name: no_tools_baseline
description: Control experiment harness: no structured tool calls. A single free-form text-completion LLM call produces the complete mechanism in one shot, with no pre-loop analysis and no post-step validators. Used to measure raw LLM performance without harness scaffolding.
execution_note: This harness has no pre_loop_modules and no post_step_modules. The loop_module uses text_completion kind, which means no tool schema is enforced — the LLM responds in free-form text. Results are scored identically to harness runs for direct comparison.

loop_module.label: Propose Mechanism (Text Completion)
loop_module.description: Single free-form text-completion call per step. No tool schema enforced. The LLM receives the same prompt as the standard harness but responds without structured output constraints.

outputs: free-form text parsed for SMILES and step description

metadata.description: Minimal harness for control experiments. Compare leaderboard scores against 'default' harness to quantify the value of pre-loop analysis and deterministic validation.

changelog.description: Initial no-tools baseline harness for control experiments.
